mapper.insert: insert into analysis_record(project_id, version_id, api_path, record_type, user_description, request_body, response_body, stack_trace, screenshot_paths, trace_id, request_time, environment, database_access_level, schema_datasource_id, business_datasource_id, conclusion, confidence, evidence_json, auto_verify, auto_verify_keywords, rounds_count, total_tokens, created_by, created_at) values (#{projectId}, #{versionId}, #{apiPath}, #{recordType}, #{userDescription}, #{requestBody}, #{responseBody}, #{stackTrace}, #{screenshotPaths}, #{traceId}, #{requestTime}, #{environment}, #{databaseAccessLevel}, #{schemaDatasourceId}, #{businessDatasourceId}, #{conclusion}, #{confidence}, #{evidenceJson}, #{autoVerify}, #{autoVerifyKeywords}, #{roundsCount}, #{totalTokens}, #{createdBy}, now())
mapper.select:
select r.id, r.project_id, r.api_path, r.record_type, r.confidence, r.auto_verify, r.feedback_verdict, substring(r.conclusion, 1, 300) as conclusion, r.created_at, coalesce(u.display_name, u.username) as created_by_name from analysis_record r left join users u on u.id = r.created_by
order by r.id desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
mapper.delete:
delete from analysis_record where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select id, project_id, api_path, record_type, user_description, conclusion, confidence, evidence_json, environment, database_access_level, schema_datasource_id, business_datasource_id, auto_verify, feedback_verdict, actual_root_cause, expect_keywords, created_at from analysis_record where id = #{id}
select project_id from analysis_record where id = #{id}
mapper.update: update analysis_record set feedback_verdict = #{verdict}, actual_root_cause = #{actualRootCause}, expect_keywords = #{expectKeywords}, feedback_note = #{note}, feedback_at = now() where id = #{recordId}
mapper.select: select id, api_path as apiPath, conclusion, confidence, actual_root_cause as actualRootCause, embedding, coalesce(nullif(expect_keywords, ''), auto_verify_keywords) as keywords, user_description as userDescription, stack_trace as stackTrace from analysis_record where project_id = #{projectId} and record_type = 'ANALYSIS' and (feedback_verdict = 'CORRECT' or (auto_verify = 'CONFIRMED' and auto_verify_keywords is not null and auto_verify_keywords <> '')) order by id desc limit 200

select id, project_id as projectId, version_id as versionId, api_path as apiPath, user_description as userDescription, request_body as requestBody, response_body as responseBody, stack_trace as stackTrace, trace_id as traceId, request_time as requestTime, coalesce(nullif(expect_keywords, ''), auto_verify_keywords) as expectKeywords from analysis_record where record_type = 'ANALYSIS' and ((feedback_verdict is not null and expect_keywords is not null and expect_keywords <> '' and expect_keywords <> '[]') or (auto_verify = 'CONFIRMED' and auto_verify_keywords is not null and auto_verify_keywords <> ''))
mapper.update: update analysis_record set embedding = #{embedding} where id = #{id}
